/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/src/VideoPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/src/core/AudioManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/src/core/VideoDecoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/src/core/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/src/core/WebSocketController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/video_player.dir/src/utils/Logger.cpp.o -o video_player  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lswresample -lavfilter /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ljsoncpp -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -luv -lpthread -ldl -lrt /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/local/lib/libusockets.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libavcodec.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libavformat.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libavutil.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libswscale.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libswresample.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libavfilter.so -luv -ldl -lrt /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/local/lib/libusockets.a
